description: Hearty slow cooker chicken stew with tender chicken, potatoes, and vegetables in a hearty broth. Fits 2-qt mini or larger crock pots—just dump, cook, and enjoy.
ingredients: [{"name": "boneless skinless chicken breast", "unit": "pounds", "amount": "1–1½"}, {"name": "medium onion", "unit": "medium", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "garlic", "unit": "cloves", "amount": "1–2"}, {"name": "carrots", "unit": "pieces", "amount": "2–3"}, {"name": "celery", "unit": "stalks", "amount": "1–2"}, {"name": "potatoes", "unit": "cups", "amount": "2"}, {"name": "frozen corn", "unit": "cup", "amount": "½"}, {"name": "frozen green beans", "unit": "cup", "amount": "½"}, {"name": "frozen peas", "unit": "cup", "amount": "½"}, {"name": "low-sodium chicken broth", "unit": "oz", "amount": "14"}, {"name": "poultry seasoning", "unit": "teaspoon", "amount": "½"}, {"name": "salt", "unit": "teaspoon", "amount": "½"}, {"name": "black pepper", "unit": "teaspoon", "amount": "¼"}, {"name": "celery seed", "unit": "teaspoon", "amount": "½"}, {"name": "dry thyme", "unit": "teaspoon", "amount": "¼–½"}, {"name": "cornstarch", "unit": null, "amount": null}, {"name": "drained diced tomatoes", "unit": "cup", "amount": "1"}, {"name": "mushrooms", "unit": "oz", "amount": "4"}]
instructions: 1. Prepare vegetables: chop onion, carrots, celery, peel and cube potatoes, optionally clean and halve mushrooms. 2. Prepare chicken: trim and cube chicken breasts. 3. Load crock pot: add chicken, veggies, frozen corn and beans, chicken broth, garlic, celery seed, thyme, poultry seasoning, salt, pepper, and optionally diced tomatoes. 4. Cook on LOW for 6–8 hours or HIGH for 3–4 hours. 5. Add peas during last 30 minutes. 6. For thicker stew, stir in cornstarch slurry during last 30 minutes. 7. Done when chicken reaches 165°F and potatoes are tender.
notes: Use chicken thighs for juicier meat. Add peas last to keep bright and firm. Stir in cream at the end for creamy stew. Use cornstarch slurry to thicken. Can scale recipe for different crock pot sizes. Store leftovers in airtight container up to 4 days refrigerated or 3 months frozen.
tags: Crock Pot Chicken Stew, Easy chicken stew recipe, slow cooker chicken stew
